identity.name: SolisBoard
identity.core_philosophy: Precision meets Creativity. A tool that feels like a cockpit for social growth.

cards.classes: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-900/20 font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.classes: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500/50 transition-all rounded-md

charts.tooltip_style: bg-zinc-900/90 border border-zinc-800 shadow-xl rounded-md text-sm p-3

visual_enhancers.grain_overlay: opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts immediately in index.html or CSS.
DARK MODE DEFAULT: Ensure the app defaults to dark mode class on the html/body tag.
NO PURPLE: Do not use the default shadcn purple/blue. Override with Orange/Zinc palette.
SIDEBAR: Create a persistent sidebar layout for the dashboard. Do not use top-nav only.
CHARTS: Use Recharts for the Analytics page. Style them to match the dark theme (no white backgrounds).
CALENDAR: Use 'react-big-calendar' or a custom grid for the Content Calendar if shadcn calendar is too small.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Use glassmorphism effects with backdrop filters for overlays.
